name: Jay Inslee
subject: Taking action for Dreamers [Read & Share]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Rhode Island Governor Gina Raimondo and I wrote this op-ed you need to read and share today!

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTIyMjIwNzIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI2MjI0NDA2OAS2&mt=1&rt=0) | **CONGRESS MUST PROTECT THE DREAMERS FROM EXPULSION** **" Together, we will fight to protect the safety and security of each and every Dreamer and ensure that Congress does not ignore the widespread support for Dreamers to continue working, living, studying, and contributing to our country."** **\- My _Newsweek_ op-ed with Rhode Island Governor Gina Raimondo** | [SHARE THE OP-ED »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTIyMjIwNzIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI2MjI0NDA2OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
America is a nation founded on lofty ideals. And at our best, we are a country that rises to our greatest challenges with the confidence and conviction of a nation united by common values: freedom, equality, and justice.
Friend -- we need to meet one of those challenges together, right now.
Since President Trump announced his plan to dismantle the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) program, Dreamers all across America have been faced with the terrible uncertainty of whether they will be able to continue their lives here at home in America. At a moral level, at a human level, and at an economic level -- it's just wrong.
Make no mistake, I'm not going to sit idly by as Donald Trump threatens the lives of hundreds of thousands of young Americans. While state, local, and business leaders must take action, a long-term solution must come through Congress. And it must come quickly.
Governor Gina Raimondo of Rhode Island and I made the case for congressional action in _Newsweek_. We need Congress to step up and pass long-term, comprehensive legislation to protect Dreamers.
[**I hope you agree and I hope you 'll share our op-ed with your friends and family. **](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTIyMjIwNzIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI2MjI0NDA2OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks for helping spread the word.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

name: The White House
subject: Promoting America’s Prosperity
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5b79323b98061e026ba87fa5b83d7a99bab16ab933582fceb2dad11d1f8b389be818e65bd3f66d4fe4951e26b57702a227a73e3c2a78ba5e

Enabling the American Family to Thrive

Yesterday, Ivanka Trump joined Senate and House Republicans at the Capitol to discuss the importance of increasing the child tax credit to benefit working families of America. Our tax code must recognize and support the reality that the majority of parents in the United States are a part of the workforce. As wages have stagnated over the years, the cost of raising a family has grown exponentially, creating a critical need for tax reform to ensure that all American families can invest in their children and thrive.

Learn more about the Unified Framework for Tax reform at
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5b79323b98061e022f1c034a627617d5a2497f7bcbf90c5dbe255c79e349434baa6a29324154daa2a42e33bd6f8ef786af2516918d75150a
whitehouse.gov/taxreform.

Another Step towards Recovery

On Tuesday, the Senate passed the Additional Supplemental Appropriations for Disaster Relief Requirements Act of 2017, in which the President requested additional funds for critical disaster relief to assist Americans living in Texas, Florida, Puerto Rico, the U.S. Virgin Islands, and other affected areas rebuild their lives. President Trump also received a briefing on Hurricane Harvey relief and recovery efforts in Dallas, Texas, yesterday.

Freedom, Opportunity, and Prosperity for Americans
“I’ve traveled across America this year. Every place I visit, working families and job creators have told me one thing: They told me that the biggest obstacle to their success is our country's broken tax code. One after another -- I've sat at tables in California and in cities large and small with small-business owners and families -- one after another have spoken to me about the burden that our tax system places on them and the barrier that it puts in-between them and reaching and achieving their dreams,” said Vice President Pence at the American Enterprise Institute.

President Trump has taken decisive action to promote freedom, opportunity, and prosperity for every American. To revive America’s economy, the Trump Administration has been rolling back regulations that stifle American businesses and have eroded opportunities for working families for far too long. Under the Unified Framework supported by the President, middle-income America will see tax cuts, job creation, and business growth.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5b79323b98061e02b45c69c936bd894acb5a412a9e21903654388dd44f54a0bada521cc97e8116d8b7c6fc4a2c56a297571be9b7e58abdef
See highlights of Vice President Pence’s remarks.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump, joined by Texas Gov. Gregg Abbott, Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick and FEMA officials, attends a briefing on the continuing Hurricane Harvey relief and recovery efforts | October 25, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump will participate in an event at the White House discussing the opioid crisis. Later, the President will meet with Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency Scott Pruitt.

Vice President Mike Pence will tour the Lockheed Martin Waterton Canyon Facility in Denver, Colorado, to view NASA’s InSight Mars lander spacecraft, the Collaborative Human Innovation Laboratory (CHIL), and the Air Force’s next generation GPS III satellites.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5b79323b98061e027207d5008a69e17bf930a12557a231da391111121d960f60a549ad0b1b6fa2d840912ca5d546e4786c69e7f7c03db8d3
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5b79323b98061e027c7f293eac179266fb8213ec020c0769d5fead7c11b55e21283739368b36eb3732c6ba1d5591b8b3871ac041d0043d5b
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d41552d73a6e0c3027cef4003ec8f992c2afb9fca030096f5886bbbac62eb0178b6951a26c464e75f5da26dc1504912acc
Unsubscribe

subject: FWD: I need your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Can I get your thoughts on this, Peter? |
---
| | | | | | |

Peter,

**[Did you see the President's email asking you to take the Mainstream Media Accountability Survey?](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=379db5b92e9b685d70dd576307713b9eb850df1c2606c5993a6089fd475ccc2c89ba6165d7a57598d953cdb14b33227b) **

President Trump has been calling out the Fake News' lies and attacks every single day.[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=379db5b92e9b685d7cd558c7622739eebf30447663e47d2c4c65236443532c303cf722dbe7f097110b7e6569cb832a13)_But now he wants to hear what American citizens have to say about the mainstream media._

**[Please take the Mainstream Media Accountability Survey today.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=379db5b92e9b685de64b195eb737d62256343a899588f8bd020a74fd61b6a7fc0b6c0dd9d4140b315ce2108fe4a5e3e9)**

Thanks,

Team TRUMP

**\---------- Forwarded Message ----------**
From: Donald J. Trump
Date: October 18, 2017
Subject: I need your input
To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=379db5b92e9b685d7adc1943f765eaed8159b3ea65e4f51f4541ec9f7d2701c6b428a0abdad4c9405c7e3a0c34ce0eec)**

---
| [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=379db5b92e9b685d1e9dfa172302b14cbe27d04de95f5f690658ad67c265618e64919a06df1cf321a5b9a6128df3747a)
---

Peter,

I've said it before and I will say it again:_**the Mainstream Media is out to bring down my Administration.**_

It's a 24/7 barrage of hit jobs, fake stories, and absolute hatred for everything we stand for as a movement.

It's time to once again release our Mainstream Media Accountability Survey to show them that the American people are fed up with the Fake News machine.

**[I need you to take the MEDIA ACCOUNTABILITY SURVEY to do your part to fight back against the fake news attacks and deceptions.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=379db5b92e9b685d5645b161a799663b2c1455e42287a0dfb80389361f3df7bf444e7d3ce49e7e72c529c3cf0d6cfd37)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=379db5b92e9b685d20f16d2503c081aacc5e7bb3db59737486c0b8030a87970fe78abcbfddc7b344cc59390ff6beaecf)

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Should School Choice Matter to Christians?
body:
| | We gamble with our children's future if left to educational experts and government officials
---
[ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fshould-school-choice-matter-to-christians%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171026_art_s1&n=1)
| **Should _School Choice_ matter to Christians? ** There seems to be a giant wall of division between those who defend the current state of education (anchored by the teachers union) and those who believe in school choice, by way of vouchers, special programs, and educational savings accounts. As people of faith, should we take a position on school choice? This is an issue that many believe is too complicated, better left to the educational experts and our government officials to solve. Yet, it’s an issue that gambles with the future of our children. And more importantly, it’s one that scripture speaks to clearly. In fact, at the core this is not a political issue – it’s a Biblical one. **School choice should matter to Christians for three primary reasons.** **1\. Choice Matters Because Parents Are Best Equipped to Care for their Children.** Nobody knows what a student needs to thrive educationally better than the student’s parents. A government or institution cannot possibly care for children in the same way that a father and/or mother can. We witness a great decline of society when we substitute the judgment of “experts” and bureaucratic systems for the judgment of parents. Children are entrusted to parents as a gift from God. Psalms 127:3, “Children are a gift from the LORD; they are a reward from him.” A gift that comes with great responsibility.
* Proverbs 22:6: “Train up a child in the way he should go, and when he is old he will not depart from it.”
* Deuteronomy 6:6-7: “And these words that I command you today shall be on your heart. You shall teach them diligently to your children, and shall talk of them when you sit in your house, and when you walk by the way, and when you lie down, and when you rise.”
* 3 John 1:4: “I have no greater joy than to hear that my children are walking in the truth.”

When parents can’t afford to live in a “good” school district, or don’t have the means to private school or homeschool, and are told where their children must attend school, based solely on their zip code, their freedom to educate their children as they see best is restricted. Their parental authority is compromised. “We’ve allowed ourselves, as parents, to be bumped from the ‘table.’ We’ve allowed policymakers, school administrators, and self-interested teachers’ unions to decide what’s best for our children. This needs to change.” – Pastor Jim Garlow _(Well Versed, page 78)._ **2\. Choice Matters Because Every Child is Unique.** We know from both research and common sense that every child is different and unique, created by God (Jeremiah 1:5). Cookie-cutter factory models don’t work for every child. In recent decades there has been some movement towards school choice as a few states have begun to slightly crack the door open for limited educational freedom through the allowing of charter schools. These charter schools give us a glimpse of what education would look like in a free market educational system. These are schools that are often differentiated by their special emphasis in areas such as the arts, mathematics and the sciences, classical learning, technology, and a hands-on educational model approach. In most traditional public school environments students are expected to learn at a pre-determined pace, mass-educated, moved along through the system according to standardized tests and curriculum. For many parents whose children have special needs or special giftings and talents, there are no other educational options. As one of the most advanced societies in the world, we should be doing better. It should stir us to know that our educational system is rooted in socialistic and communistic ideals rather than innovative free market ideals where opportunity abounds, choice is the currency and prosperity is the result. One more note: This is no reflection on the incredible teachers who have dedicated their lives to helping our children learn. Rather, it is an example of a broken educational system in America. **3\. School Choice Empowers the Underprivileged** **Here are the facts:**
* **50.7 Million** students attended public elementary and secondary schools in the fall of 2017 (NCES)
* Of those attending public schools, roughly **2.5 Million** students attend charter schools in the United States (Business Insider)
* Experts estimate that around **3.5 Million** students are homeschooled in the United States (Business Insider)
* **4.5 Million** students attend private elementary and secondary schools (ONPE 2014 survey)

The bottom line, the vast majority of students in America receive a public school education. It’s reasonable to assume that many did not have a say in the matter because they lacked the economic means to live in a “good” public school district, to attend a private school, or to be homeschooled. Nor were they lucky enough to win a lottery to attend a charter school. This is educational discrimination and it is simply not fair. This is un-American in every way. Pastor Jim Garlow in his book Well Versed said it best, _“We have an educational system that discriminates against the single mother and the poor, by limiting options. It’s a system that allows wealth to determine a child’s education. If you are fortunate enough to buy a home in a good school district, your child has a better chance of receiving a strong education._ _“However, if you cannot afford to live in a good district or pay for a private school, you have no choice but to send your child to the school located in your neighborhood, even if it’s a poor performing school.” (Well Versed, page 77)._ Educational Choice is just one way of extending care and compassion for the less fortunate. (1 John 3:17, Philippians 2:4, Deuteronomy 15:11). If we as Christians believe all people are equal in the sight of God and should be afforded the same freedoms regardless of economic status, then it is our responsibility to care about the education of all people, regardless of their zip code. It is our responsibility to do what we can go give all families a choice in where they educate their children. Did you know that in 2017 nearly half of America’s 1,000 largest school districts are holding elections? Those elected school board members will represent over 10 million students throughout 34 states in the U.S. Yet, local school board elections are notorious for low voter turnout—**often just five or ten percent**. We can do better, and as Christians, we have a great opportunity to bring the influence of our faith into this important responsibility of educating our kids. We created this 3-part series on school board elections to address some critical issues that every voter should consider in their local school board election. Thanks for reading part two of our education series! If you missed it, read last week's article, "Why Should You Care About Your Local School Board."
* * *

By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics._

name: Catherine Engelbrecht
subject: Hollow Apologies from the IRS
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this email, view it online.

Hollow Apologies from the IRS Won't Prevent
Future Discrimination and Abuse
True the Vote Statement on Other Conservative
Groups' Settlements of IRS Lawsuits

HOUSTON, TX - October 26, 2017 - Today, True
the Vote founder Catherine Engelbrecht released the following
statement regarding the recent announcement of settlements in the
Linchpins of Liberty v. United States and NorCal Tea Party
Patriots v. IRS cases.

"The settlements are notable in that, for the
first time, the IRS admitted their discrimination against
conservative groups was wrong and unlawful. But what is to
prevent it from happening again?

Hollow apologies from the IRS won't prevent
future discrimination and abuse. The American people deserve
more", said Engelbrecht, "True the Vote welcomes the Department
of Justice's offer to enter into settlement negotiations in our
case, provided that the outcome produces meaningful protections
for all organizations. Regardless of your political viewpoint, no
one should ever be subjected to what we were put through."

"True the Vote believes that an injunction is
needed against the IRS to ensure that in the future, under
Republican or Democrat administrations, political opponents are
not targeted by the IRS for discriminatory and unlawful
treatment," said True the Vote attorney, Jim Bopp.

As of today, True the Vote's lawsuit against
the IRS remains unsettled.

subject: Don’t let Wells Fargo and Equifax get away with it
body:
Dear Activist,

I'm fighting to hold big banks like Wells Fargo and giant corporations like Equifax accountable when they break the law, cheat their customers, and put the American people at risk.

When you stand up to Wall Street and the powerful interests, the right-wing Super PACs come after you. Billionaire hedge fund tycoon Robert Mercer – the money behind Steve Bannon’s dirty tricks in 2016 – is already dumping money into Massachusetts to beat me in 2018.

I've never backed down from a tough fight – not from the big Wall Street banks, or Mitch McConnell and the Senate Republicans, or Donald Trump. I know that the people of Massachusetts didn’t send me to the Senate to roll over and play dead while the big banks, financial institutions, and their buddies in Washington rig the system for the rich and powerful.

But I need your help to fight back against the right-wing, corporate attacks so I can keep fighting for you in the United States Senate. Add your name to join the fight (http://join.elizabethwarren.com/hold-accountable/?source=BPI2017-LB-DM-PET&subsource=OCT-OPTIN&utm_source=DM&utm_campaign=BPI2017-LB-DM-PET) .

Elizabeth Warren

name: Team Kaine
subject: Add your name: Restore the Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek --

**The right to vote is one of the most basic, critical rights we hold as Americans. [It's a right that many have died for, and a right that each and every one of us must continue to protect.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=m6g6X3YSGghNXU8XcUvxL2hO29pMJiOH)**

Because of our country's history of discrimination, the Voting Rights Act was signed in 1965 to help ensure that African Americans were able to overcome barriers to exercising their constitutional right to vote. In fact, one section of the VRA made sure that certain states -- states with particularly egregious treatment of African American citizens -- weren't able to pass voting restrictions without approval from the Department of Justice. Those restrictions could include voter ID requirements or changes to district maps.

Well, in 2013, the Supreme Court struck down that critical section of the VRA, because some, including Chief Justice John Roberts, believed our country had changed. Unfortunately, the very consequences of striking down those rules showed that our country hasn't changed nearly enough yet -- once they were allowed, states around the country proceeded to pass voting law after voting law that discriminated against people of color.

**This is simply unacceptable. We must do everything in our power to ensure equal representation in our democracy.** That's why Team Kaine is joining with the National Democratic Redistricting Committee to call on Congress to reinstate the Section 5 of the Voting Rights Act's preclearance process for states wishing to update voting laws.

**[Congress has the power to stop discriminatory voting laws before they're put into place. Today, add your name to demand that they do just that.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=FExMG0J8V0vy7oGs2CeTA2hO29pMJiOH)**

Thank you.

-Team Kaine | | [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=EN9oh%2BLNMyrXWlc1SONRY8H9Ntz4AyBk)
---

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde46/2a380d31/244c46e/fe14b8/3912924474/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde46/2a380d31/244c46e/fe14b8/3912924474/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
There's no denying it, everyone. The right to vote is under attack.
It's under attack because ultraconservative Republicans can't stop fantasizing about a voter fraud problem that just plain old doesn't exist, and it begs a question about what part of democracy they're afraid of.
You don't have to look far to find the answer. State-level Republicans are passing voting laws and talking about drawing district lines that discriminate against minorities and communities of color. They're silencing hard-working families and rigging the system to tip the scales in their favor.
The scary part is that over the last few years, we've seen that their attempts at voter suppression are working.
**Congress has the power to render these attempts at silencing targeted groups of Americans ineffective, but so far it has not acted.[Will you sign our petition to urge Congress to stop discriminatory voting laws before they happen?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde46/2a380d31/244c46e/fe14b9/3912924474/VEsF/ "http://www.grassrootsact.com/ndrcvra?utm_source=hassan&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ndrcvra")**
Look, if we don't protect voting rights, equal representation in our democracy cannot and will not be realized.
This is a real problem, and we ALL need to speak up.
[**The time to take real action to protect voting rights is now, so please add your name to tell Congress that every single one of us deserves a voice in our elections.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde46/2a380d31/244c46e/fe14b9/3912924474/VEsC/ "http://www.grassrootsact.com/ndrcvra?utm_source=hassan&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ndrcvra")

The polls are statistically tied, we have momentum, and our final deadline is tonight.
We need to raise the resources to win this race so we can fund our Get-Out-The-Vote efforts and share our message on TV and through targeted digital ads.

Your generous contribution will help us get our winning message out.
I am running for Lt. Governor because, with the right policies, Virginia can be the nation's best state to live, work, and raise a family. We can get our economy growing again and tackle our biggest challenges, from health care, to education, to transportation.
My opponent has a very different and far-left vision for Virginia's future, one which would end private health insurance for more than five million Virginians who have it. Let's make this count!

Sincerely,

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Vincent Fort
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
We have a chance to win a major victory in Atlanta, Georgia, the largest city in the south, in an election that takes place less than two weeks from today.
#
Sisters and Brothers -
The political revolution is not just about campaigns for the White House, the U.S. Senate, the U.S. House and other high-profile positions. It's about winning elections for school board, for city council, for the state legislature - and for mayor. It's about bringing people into the political process and building strong grassroots movements in community after community.
And I'm happy to tell you that, as progressives, we are making real progress doing just that - winning elections at the local level. In the last year, progressives have taken on the establishment all over this country and have won important local races - including victories for mayor in Jackson, Mississippi and Birmingham, Alabama.
Now, we have a chance to win a major victory in Atlanta, Georgia, the largest city in the south, in an election that takes place less than two weeks from today.
When Georgia State Senator Vincent Fort switched sides in the Democratic primary and endorsed our campaign, the political establishment did everything they could to exact their revenge against him. They even recruited a primary opponent to run against him as punishment.
But Vincent won, and now he's running to serve as the next mayor of Atlanta. And with the election just a few weeks away, many of the same forces inside of the political and financial establishment are doing everything they can to ensure he doesn't get a top two spot to qualify for the run-off.
While Vincent's opponents are collecting huge campaign checks and spending obscene amounts of their own personal wealth to buy this election, Vincent is raising money from lots of people giving small donations - just like we did on our campaign.
Vincent Fort is a champion of our political revolution - a stalwart progressive who has spent his entire career standing up for civil rights, for working people and for those in need. Time after time he has taken on corporate greed and corruption. With time running out before his election, he needs us today:
**[Please make a $3 donation to Vincent Fort's campaign to serve as the next mayor of Atlanta. Election Day is right around the corner, so every single donation will make a big difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bs-vincent-fort?refcode=bernie-em171026-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bs-vincent-fort?refcode=bernie-em171026-full")**
Sending Vincent Fort into a run-off in Atlanta would send an unmistakable message that the values that power our political revolution are on the move and can win anywhere.
This election is critical to our movement. One of our friends needs our help. The polls show this race is tight. Please help if you can.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
******[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bs-vincent-fort?refcode=bernie-em171026-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bs-vincent-fort?refcode=bernie-em171026-full")******
**** ****

Our final deadline is tonight and we are busy planning our TV and digital ad buys for the rest of the race.
How much we can buy and where depends on what we raise tonight. That's why we need to dig deep for every last dollar from our team and from our friends.
Our message is a winning message and [your generous contribution of $1000, $500, $100, or even $50](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00175WCCrVpByLmoDbf3yMhfJTCNqcKKdZFOlHwrODnb2Kb9KdBKE4r1zzl8puEHYWy-wCqFkC54RLqn_iWiYHHG7DqbO14rFqwfH8Tb0c9QDtSd5u9wnBfqnaxOQMr6ukVYwqfrWp7wKf05Ek31e5ohCr_ASaegsyLQ8M4VnZRI6ZtA-Cs1zqUUir99jJu8eGFuy6bwkMuUkE=&c=5qdHrJxlH4eTtZx1iTYxLQYNIDrLDr9GTTdLuA6MqLcVfpcLYboA4A==&ch=nVZFRTXTihA15q7QQqcL52hqDbZg10LjNZY-H-6FoJGPUSKMyjXiPA==) will go a long way to showcasing some of the key policy differences in this race. Click below to donate tonight.
[https://donate.vogelforvirginia.com/contribute](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00175WCCrVpByLmoDbf3yMhfJTCNqcKKdZFOlHwrODnb2Kb9KdBKE4r1zzl8puEHYWy-wCqFkC54RLqn_iWiYHHG7DqbO14rFqwfH8Tb0c9QDtSd5u9wnBfqnaxOQMr6ukVYwqfrWp7wKf05Ek31e5ohCr_ASaegsyLQ8M4VnZRI6ZtA-Cs1zqUUir99jJu8eGFuy6bwkMuUkE=&c=5qdHrJxlH4eTtZx1iTYxLQYNIDrLDr9GTTdLuA6MqLcVfpcLYboA4A==&ch=nVZFRTXTihA15q7QQqcL52hqDbZg10LjNZY-H-6FoJGPUSKMyjXiPA==)
The race is down to the wire. Polls are statistically tied and the momentum is on our side. This will be our year.
Will you help us close strong with a donation of whatever you can? This is our final deadline -- and very, very important.
With your help, we will get our message out, get the vote out, and bring new leadership to Richmond.
We are so close. Will you help us close strong in the final stretch?
Can you forward this email to three friends and ask them to give what they can, whether it's $50 or even $25?

Sincerely,
Eloise Hincker
Campaign Coordinator

subject: Why we're fighting in the Alabama special election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Mother Jones just described the Alabama Senate special election as a race between a civil rights champion and "a caricature of the state's old -- and bigoted -- ways."
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171026-MustRead_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
_**Mother Jones: "Doug Jones is hoping that a civil rights message can defeat Roy Moore and send a Democrat to the Senate"**_
Team,

_Mother Jones_ profiled our Alabama Senate nominee Doug Jones this week, writing about his legacy of bringing KKK members to justice. Here's what the profile said:

> _" Just as his prosecution of the church bombers provided closure not only to the victims' families and the black community but also to Alabama as a whole, Jones' candidacy gives voters an opportunity to change the reputation of their state."_
Doug Jones is running on his commitment to justice and civil rights -- against a candidate _Mother Jones_ called "a caricature of the state's old -- and bigoted -- ways."

[**The Alabama Senate special election is a chance for us to be on the right side of history. Contribute $1 now to help our Senate candidates defeat GOP extremists, starting in Alabama.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171026-MustRead_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Doug faces an uphill battle in the December special election. After all, Alabama hasn't elected a Democratic Senator in more than 20 years.

But as _Mother Jones_ reported, "It may be a long shot, but bringing about convictions in a racially charged cold case seemed like a long shot at one time, too."

**This fight won 't be easy, but it's worth fighting, team. Pitch in $1 now to give our Senate candidates the resources to take on extremists like Roy Moore:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/worth-fighting**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171026-MustRead_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. | Dear Peter,
Our grassroots team is working overtime to win in just 12 days, on November 7th. We are knocking doors, calling our neighbors, and visiting community events.
When we win, it will be a victory for Virginia's grassroots who made it possible.
When those vote totals come in, it will be all the hard work and generosity of our volunteers and supporters which puts us over the top.
[That is why I am asking for the most generous contribution you can give before tonight's deadline to support our grassroots and their efforts in getting out the vote and sharing our winning message of making Virginia an even better place to live, work, and raise your family.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012OBu4PnkuytgUjzsiIwZzblc8D839EQDTQXeeB0O3G8tRCQV0NC2ZSqIamvd0fKThbWBECTIy92Pe4qSqo9BJizg24cyNtE4BnVhgzJn7B4HhT0oF2EV_pDNZ6APZpqZnEwmCbL0xa-7TRCnoeZBokcvJJuEru4p77n-QTbVsBk=&c=7ZEQ_z1n4op3GMNBEu3V8BCwASRxrjkNX8SB_TnYgDnGzQikRtWr5g==&ch=2BA4yFiiGTZGUq2YYcLeIMYQhGMynxQNr9zalhrgRftf-3ejREevrw==)

We cannot afford to leave our grassroots behind!
We are strong because we are a team, working together, getting things done for Virginia.
[Will you stand with our team on this final report with a contribution of whatever you can give?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012OBu4PnkuytgUjzsiIwZzblc8D839EQDTQXeeB0O3G8tRCQV0NC2ZSqIamvd0fKThbWBECTIy92Pe4qSqo9BJizg24cyNtE4BnVhgzJn7B4HhT0oF2EV_pDNZ6APZpqZnEwmCbL0xa-7TRCnoeZBokcvJJuEru4p77n-QTbVsBk=&c=7ZEQ_z1n4op3GMNBEu3V8BCwASRxrjkNX8SB_TnYgDnGzQikRtWr5g==&ch=2BA4yFiiGTZGUq2YYcLeIMYQhGMynxQNr9zalhrgRftf-3ejREevrw==)
